calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Petitioner: Xiao Juan Liang, for minors Judy Chan, Luciano Chan Wei Xiong and Carla Chan Mei Ling, present, in pro per, with Cantonese Interpreter Francis Ha, was sworn and examined.
Consent declaration by Minor's Father, filed in open court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name as follows:
Xiao Juan Liang to Janet Xiao Liang
Judy Chan to Judy Mei Chan
Luciano Chan Wei Xiong to Brian Wei Chan
Carla Chan Mei Ling to Carla Mei Chan
Decree signed in open court.
